name: Boar
description: A shotgun with low accuracy and strong recoil, but able to deliver its payload in full-auto. The Boar is best used at close range.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A shotgun with low accuracy and strong recoil, but able to deliver its payload in full-auto. The Boar is best used at close range.

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes: Now Boarding

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Boar
Boar Prime

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Hotfix 31.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Sentient Mimics, Anu Mantalysts, Anu Pyrolysts (the latter 2 being Railjack Boarding party enemies) dropping their arm pieces when destroyed.

patchlogs.name: Angels of the Zariman: Hotfix 31.5.5
patchlogs.changes: Boarding squad

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: The look of Corrupted Lancers has also been updated with this fix and they now carry Arca Plasmors instead of Boars.

patchlogs.name: Prime Resurgence: Hotfix 30.9.4
patchlogs.changes: Boar Prime

patchlogs.name: Update 30.5: Sisters of Parvos
patchlogs.changes: Added small and large grind slam FX and set the default Board to its original orange for K-Drives.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Update 30
patchlogs.fixes:
Void Storms gather in Corpus lanes…could a mysterious vessel somehow be the case? Board your Railjack and investigate the call.
All on-foot enemies are subject to becoming Corrupted from Void Fissures. Boarding parties, Point of Interest enemies, Crewship enemies, etc once Corrupted can all drop Reactant needed to open your Relic. Reactant is a shared pickup for Void Storms! Since Railjack requires Tenno to coordinate across multiple environments simultaneously, we felt that having shared Reactant pickups would help squads open Relics in a co-op friendly way.

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.5
patchlogs.changes: Fixed a rare crash if you had Corpus Ice Sleds and Boarding parties happen at the same time.

patchlogs.name: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack: Hotfix 29.10.1
patchlogs.changes: Added a new Profile > Railjack option that now holds Board Railjack, Intrinsics, and Plexus menus.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Boar reload animation to prevent clipping into the side of the gun.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.1.2 + Hotfix 29.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Boar not having a reload sound.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.changes: Nef Anyo claims to have found an heir to the long-deceased Corpus Founder, Parvos Granum, and has the means to prove it. The Solaris have begun disappearing in droves and Eudico thinks it has something to do with Nef’s power play. Whoever they are, the heir to the Founder would be able to solve the stalemate and stage a total takeover of the Corpus Board. If Nef Anyo has anything to do with it, that spells bad news for the Solaris.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes: Added support to Sword & Board skins to have consistent main-hand holster positions and scaling regardless of base weapon.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue where using "Board Railjack" / "Return to Orbiter" from the top menu while not close to the action itself would fail to execute it.
Fixed issue where Sword & Board weapon Skins would not preview with the shield opened.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.11
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when a Boarding Party comes knockin.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Hotfix 27.3.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ramsleds trying to initiate a Boarding Party after the mission is complete.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed inability to disengage bombs placed by Grineer Boarding Parties if a Host migration occurs during a Railjack mission.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.12 + 27.0.12.1
patchlogs.changes: Sharing is caring! Loot gathered when on-foot in a Point of Interest, Crewship, and from killing a Boarding Party are now shared between the whole squad, so you don’t individually need to go collect the loot if you’re busy Piloting, Engineering, etc!

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.11 - 27.0.11.3
patchlogs.changes: An example of this situation would be if the mission succeeded while a Boarding Party was still aboard, but not fully dealt with until after the mission success popup.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Hotfix 27.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Grineer Railjack Boarding Party having some incorrect Melee FX.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Update 27
patchlogs.fixes: You can enter your Railjack from the Dry Dock itself, via the Railjack express console at the back of your Orbiter (located just outside the Personal Quarters area), or by accessing the “Board Railjack” option in the Menu from your Orbiter (option to “Return to Orbiter” is also available while on the Railjack!).

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.2.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some cables that were deemed unsafe by the Corpus Workplace Safety Board.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.6
patchlogs.changes: Nova Prime, Mag Prime, Soma Prime, Boar Prime, Dakra Prime, and Vasto Prime Relics have been added to Plains of Eidolon Bounties, Orb Vallis Bounties, and in the Void drop table.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.changes: These components do not offer any stat bonuses, but the Board will earn you Mastery when you rank up your K-Drive -

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ergo’s Boardroom Scene showing a quest marker for Glast Gambit.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix: Lunaro 7 + 7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect Prime item drop values in T4 Mobile Defense and Survival. The return of Mag Prime, Dakra Prime, and Boar Prime skewed the drop tables accidentally, and for that we apologize. (One job, Sheldon) Please note that consoles will receive this fix in a near Hotfix.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix: Lunaro 6
patchlogs.additions: Mag Prime, Boar Prime, and the Dakra Prime have been added to the Void for a limited time:

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the damage of the Boar series in Conclave.
Increased the ammo pool of the Boar series in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.7
patchlogs.additions: Drekar Troopers now have a chance to drop the Boar Blueprint.
patchlogs.fixes:
Unique Tennogen Avatars and the Boar have now arrived!  The Boar makes its triumphant return with a fresh new visual overhaul.  Previous Boar owners will automatically have their weapons visually upgraded, but if you haven't picked up the classic shotgun before now's the time to try out its devastating power.
Find the Boar and our community-created Tennogen Avatars in the Market today!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.11.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Boar Prime appearing in ultra rare Loot Crates. It has been replaced with the Scindo Prime Blueprint.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.11: Ash Prime + Hotfix 16.11.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mag, Boar and Dakra parts still dropping for players in the Void.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of all Strun and Boar weapons in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where having a status chance greater than 100% on the Boar Prime and Strun Wraith would cause the UI to display “0”

patchlogs.name: Update 13.5.0: Edo Armor & Nami Solo
patchlogs.fixes: Rending Crane: Rampaging Boar!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 12.0.2
patchlogs.changes: Tweaks to Boar Prime sounds.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.4
patchlogs.changes: Boar Prime proc chance lowered.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.5.0: The Gradivus Dilemma
patchlogs.changes: Boar Prime energy colour is now tint-able.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Prime Boar energy colour not being tintable.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.10.0: Weekend Extermination Event!
patchlogs.changes: All Shotguns get a boost, effective range increased. Hek is boosted further than Strun and Boar.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Paris and Boar sounds that were not consistent between what the user hears and what the other players hear.
